zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Cocton於1139年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親William de Coughton III32歲，母親Anne De Cocton28歲。她於1157年與Randulph de Coughton在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1199年在西班牙享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Cocton于1139年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲William de Coughton III32岁，母亲Anne De Cocton28岁。她于1157年与Randulph de Coughton在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1199年在西班牙享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cocton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Little Cockstones in Stebbing (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Cocton was born in 1139, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, her father, William de Coughton III, was 32 and her mother, Anne De Cocton, was 28. She married Randulph de Coughton in 1157, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1199, in Spain, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Cocton est née en 1139, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Coughton III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne De Cocton, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Randulph de Coughton en 1157, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1199, à Espagne, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.Aston Bruley, Worcestershire, England: Aston Magna, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Cocton 1139 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Coughton III 32 und ihre Mutter Anne De Cocton 28. Sie hat 1157 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England Randulph de Coughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1199 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Cocton è nata il nel 1139 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William de Coughton III, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Anne De Cocton, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Randulph de Coughton nel 1157, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1199, nel Spagna, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Coctonが1139年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父William de Coughton IIIは32歳，母Anne De Coctonは28歳であった。1157年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンでRandulph de Coughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1199年にスペインで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Cocton(이)가 1139년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Coughton III(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne De Cocton(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1157년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 Randulph de Coughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1199년 스페인에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Cocton nasceu em 1139, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Coughton III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne De Cocton, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Randulph de Coughton em 1157, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1199, em Espanha, com 60 anos.

ro.Aston Bruley, Worcestershire, England: Aston Magna, Worcestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Cocton родилась в 1139 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Coughton III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne De Cocton, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randulph de Coughton в 1157 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1199 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Cocton nació en 1139, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Coughton III, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anne De Cocton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Randulph de Coughton en 1157, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1199, en España, a la edad de 60 años.
